title: The Souler Opposite
review_summary: A hilarious, original love story with perfect humor; praises for Chris Meloni's Oscar-worthy acting, hopeful message about overcoming adversity through comedy.

title: Reckless
review_summary: The reviewer enjoyed this lighthearted mini-series about an older woman falling in love with younger man; despite some clichés due to its romantic nature—featuring Robson Greene's compelling performance—the story was engaging enough but felt longer than necessary for two episodes. A sequel is expected soon on Netflix, though the series could have been tighter at just two parts.
